name: Fibergate Inc.
summary: Fibergate Inc. provides communication services in Japan. It offers free Wi-Fi spot construction/operation services; free Wi-Fi services for foreigners, buses, events, and tenants; hotel Wi-Fi implementation services; and corporate network services, including Internet VPN service, IPv6 migration solution, etc. The company also develops, manufactures, and sells communication equipment, such as Wi-Fi router. In addition, it engages in the Internet advertising business and resale of mobile lines. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
